turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. I want an appointment for a sports injury. I play cricket and I hurt my shoulder during practice last weekend.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Sorry to hear that! Our orthopaedic team handles sports injuries. May I have your name and number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Dr. Pramod Joshi specialises in sports-related orthopaedic injuries. He has a slot this Friday at 11 AM. Sound good?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Friday works. Should I get any scans done beforehand?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: It's usually better to let Dr. Joshi examine you first and then order specific scans if needed. Bring any X-rays or reports you may have already done though.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: I had an X-ray done locally. I'll bring it.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Perfect. Mayank Shukla, Friday 11 AM with Dr. Joshi. Get well soon and back on the pitch quickly!
